This is standard practice for such factory files and does not constitute a security risk. Hardcoded ABIs are common and not inherently dangerous unless they contain malicious code, which they do not here.\n\n**Recommendation:**  \nThe securityRisk score should remain at 0, as the hardcoded ABI is normal and safe. The overall assessment indicates no security concern.\n\n---\n\n### Final Overall Assessment:\n\n- **Malware Score:** All reports correctly identify no malicious behavior.
